introSection:
Cyclon is a steel roller coaster located at Lunapark in Odessa, Odessa, Ukraine.

This may be the same roller coaster as Meteor Roller Coaster at Sportland Pier.
fullText:
Cyclon is a steel roller coaster located at Lunapark in Odessa, Odessa, Ukraine.

This may be the same roller coaster as Meteor Roller Coaster at Sportland Pier.

Yellow track and blue supports.
